sourceNoteIntro: This Pulse uses CRMLS / InfoSparks data for Vernon, with the article read and chart defaulting to the Residential / Single family live MLS slice sourced from 7/5/2026. The broader Residential export is also available from 7/2/2026. It also uses official city, school, federal, state, and consumer sources for local due-diligence context. Use this as orientation, not a property valuation, legal opinion, lending quote, insurance opinion, school assignment, or forecast.

notes: Housing Market Pulse generated from structured manifest. Keyword intent angle: thin sample pricing confidence. Primary keyword: Vernon housing market update. Google Keyword Planner seed queries: Vernon housing market; Vernon real estate market update; Vernon home prices July 2026; should I sell my house in Vernon; Vernon home selling market; Vernon homes for sale inventory; Vernon days on market; Vernon listing price; Vernon seller market; Vernon housing market 2026; Vernon market update sellers; Vernon median home price; are home prices dropping in Vernon; is now a good time to sell in Vernon. Research packet records editorial context. Visible avatar labels are prohibited and were not used in public page headings, badges, or category labels. Market metrics reviewed: medianSalePrice, averageSalePrice, averagePpsf, medianOriginalPrice, newListings, activeInventory, pendingSales, closedSales, medianDaysOnMarket, averageDaysOnMarket. Missing/no-data metrics: monthsSupply, closedVolume, totalClosedSides, medianLastListPrice, averageLastListPrice, medianShowsToContract, averageShowsToContract, showsPerListing.
